zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Wolvey於1280年出生在英國瓦維其可爾沃爾維時，她的父親Thomas De Wolvey Knight23歲，母親Alice Clinton21歲。她於1315年6月15日與Henry De Erdington在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年在英國享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃爾維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Wolvey于1280年出生在英国瓦維其可爾沃爾維时，她的父亲Thomas De Wolvey Knight23岁，母亲Alice Clinton21岁。她于1315年6月15日与Henry De Erdington在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年在英国享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾沃爾維。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wolvey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: locative name, toponymic from Wolvey (Warwicks), or topographic from Middle English wolf ‘wolf’ + heie ‘hedge, enclosure’, perhaps for a person whose job it was to trap wolves or to protect other animals from them. Some of the early bearers may belong with (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Old English personal name Wulfgifu (f) ‘wolf‐gift’. See also Woolway .

variants.name: Woolway
meanings: English: relationship name from a Middle English descendant of Old English Wulfwīg ‘wolf‐war’. This might also have contributed to Wolvey .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Wolvey was born in 1280, in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, her father, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, was 23 and her mother, Alice Clinton, was 21. She married Henry De Erdington on 15 June 1315, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1322, in England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Wolvey est née en 1280, à Wolvey, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Clinton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Henry De Erdington le 15 juin 1315, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1322, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Wolvey, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Wolvey 1280 in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas De Wolvey Knight 23 und ihre Mutter Alice Clinton 21. Sie hat am 15. Juni 1315 in Warwickshire, England Henry De Erdington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1322 im Alter von 42 Jahren in England und wurde in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Wolvey è nata il nel 1280 nel Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alice Clinton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Henry De Erdington il 15 giugno 1315, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1322, nel England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Wolveyが1280年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルビーで生まれた時，父Thomas De Wolvey Knightは23歳，母Alice Clintonは21歳であった。1315年6月15日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでHenry De Erdingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年にイギリスで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Wolvey(이)가 1280년 영국 워윅실르 울비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas De Wolvey Knight(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Clinton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1315년 6월 15일 영국 워윅실르에서 Henry De Erdington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 영국에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 울비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Wolvey nasceu em 1280, em Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Clinton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry De Erdington em 15 de junho de 1315, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1322, em Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Wolvey родилась в 1280 г. в местности волви, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas De Wolvey Knight было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Clinton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry De Erdington 15 июня 1315 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1322 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности волви, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Wolvey nació en 1280, en Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Clinton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Henry De Erdington el 15 de junio de 1315, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1322, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
